title: Amount parsing and ZEC/zatoshi conversion utilities
description: Parse user-entered amounts: '0.01' '0.01 ZEC' '1000 zatoshi'. Validate range (> 0, <= MAX_MONEY). Convert between ZEC (decimal string) and zatoshi (u64). Reject scientific notation and locale-specific decimal separators. Unit tests with edge cases.
close_reason: Done: parse_zec_to_zatoshi() and zatoshi_to_zec_string() implemented in commands.rs with full test coverage (roundtrip, edge cases, overflow).
